prompt:
Add missing Sonarr write capabilities beyond season monitoring (which is being added separately). 

## Context
The Sonarr client (internal/sonarr/client.go) currently has GET, POST, and DELETE HTTP methods. A PUT method and UpdateSeries are being added by another agent — DO NOT add those, they will already exist. Focus on these additional capabilities:

## 1. Episode Search Command (trigger download)
The agent can do manual_search to find releases, but can't actually trigger a download/search.

- Add to Client interface: `Command(ctx context.Context, cmd CommandRequest) error`
- Add CommandRequest type to types.go: `{Name string `json:"name"`, SeriesID int `json:"seriesId,omitempty"`, SeasonNumber *int `json:"seasonNumber,omitempty"`}`
- Implement: POST /api/v3/command with body
- Add tool 'trigger_series_search' — input: seriesID (required), seasonNumber (optional). Calls Command with name 'SeriesSearch' or 'SeasonSearch'. Mark as destructive.

## 2. Delete Series
- Add to Client interface: `DeleteSeries(ctx context.Context, seriesID int, deleteFiles bool) error`
- Implement: DELETE /api/v3/series/{id}?deleteFiles={bool}
- Add tool 'delete_series' — input: seriesID (required), deleteFiles bool (default false). Mark as destructive.

## 3. Blocklist Management
- Add to Client interface: `DeleteBlocklistItem(ctx context.Context, id int) error`
- Implement: DELETE /api/v3/blocklist/{id}
- Add tool 'remove_blocklist_item' — input: id (required). Mark as destructive.

## 4. Grab Release (trigger download of a specific release)
- Add to Client interface: `GrabRelease(ctx context.Context, guid string, indexerID int) error`
- Add GrabReleaseRequest type: `{GUID string `json:"guid"`, IndexerID int `json:"indexerId"`}`
- Implement: POST /api/v3/release with body
- Add tool 'grab_release' — input: guid string (required), indexerID int (required). The agent would use manual_search first to find releases, then grab_release to download one. Mark as destructive.

## Files to modify
- internal/sonarr/types.go — new types (CommandRequest, GrabReleaseRequest)
- internal/sonarr/client.go — new interface methods + implementations (lines 15-30 for interface, add implementations near existing methods)
- internal/agent/tools.go — new tool definitions in sonarrToolDefs() (around line 260), add to destructiveTools map (line ~135)
- internal/agent/agent.go — new cases in dispatchTool() switch (around line 286)

## Patterns to follow
- Look at existing tools like add_series and remove_failed for how destructive tools work
- Follow the same error handling patterns (json.Unmarshal input, call client, return result)
- Input structs use jsonschema_description tags for tool descriptions

Run 'make test' or 'go test ./...' before creating the PR.
